title: Near Miss Reporting
description: Encourages employees to report unsafe events before they become injuries.
recommendation: Create a simple reporting process and review near misses weekly.

title: PPE Compliance
description: Focuses on the correct use of personal protective equipment in work areas.
recommendation: Train workers, inspect PPE condition, and enforce usage requirements.

title: Housekeeping Inspection
description: Helps identify blocked walkways, spills, waste buildup, and unsafe storage.
recommendation: Conduct routine inspections and assign corrective actions immediately.

title: Fire Extinguisher Checks
description: Ensures fire extinguishers are accessible, inspected, and ready for use.
recommendation: Check pressure gauges, access routes, inspection tags, and locations monthly.

title: Emergency Evacuation Drill
description: Tests employee readiness during fire, chemical release, or emergency evacuation.
recommendation: Conduct drills regularly and document lessons learned after each exercise.

title: First Aid Readiness
description: Ensures first aid kits, trained first aiders, and emergency contacts are available.
recommendation: Inspect first aid boxes monthly and refresh first aider training.

title: Chemical Spill Response
description: Provides guidance for controlling and reporting chemical spills safely.
recommendation: Provide spill kits, SDS access, and spill response training.

title: Waste Segregation
description: Supports proper separation of general, recyclable, hazardous, and medical waste.
recommendation: Use labeled bins and train staff on correct waste disposal practices.

title: Energy Conservation
description: Promotes efficient use of energy to reduce operating costs and emissions.
recommendation: Switch off unused equipment and monitor high-energy processes.

title: Water Conservation
description: Encourages responsible water use and quick repair of leaks.
recommendation: Track water usage and inspect for leaks during routine facility checks.

title: Toolbox Talk Planning
description: Helps supervisors deliver short safety discussions before work begins.
recommendation: Keep talks brief, practical, and focused on current workplace hazards.

title: Manual Handling Safety
description: Reduces injuries caused by poor lifting, carrying, pushing, or pulling methods.
recommendation: Train employees on safe lifting and provide mechanical aids where needed.

title: Working at Height
description: Covers controls for ladders, scaffolds, fall protection, and elevated work.
recommendation: Use fall prevention controls and inspect equipment before use.

title: Machine Guarding
description: Ensures moving machine parts are guarded to prevent contact injuries.
recommendation: Inspect guards regularly and stop equipment when guards are missing.

title: Permit to Work
description: Controls high-risk tasks such as hot work, confined space entry, and electrical work.
recommendation: Verify approvals, hazards, controls, and close-out before work starts.
